author: anon-13168fa2
content: Added 'Data Formats You Will See: JSON' section to 00-foundations/02-what-code-actually-is.md between Files and Folders and The Takeaway. Shows a valid JSON example with line-by-line annotations (curly braces = object, square brackets = array, keys always quoted, commas separate, no trailing comma), then a broken example with a trailing comma and the exact error parser text it produces, then the three other common JSON errors. Includes a brief YAML mention so the reader recognizes it later when CI files appear in Phase 3.
